title: FU-D-5g — Mechanical cleanup bundle (misspelling sweep + stale handoff MD + CRM scope review)
description: Three mechanical FUs bundled into one scope-locked branch. OUT-1: misspelling sweep — 28 occurrences of 'Luhtana' corrected to 'Luhtala' across 14 instance authority blocks (7 deliverables + 7 rules). OUT-2: stale handoff MD removed from repo root (NEXT_AGENT_HANDOFF_DAG_INTEGRATION_2026-01-28.md). OUT-3: CRM scope review verdict captured — namespace remains in .refsignore pending CRM activation.

transitions.trigger: Spec authored following substrate-read dispatch report (2026-06-01 14:47 PDT). Erik authorized dispatch. Three FUs bundled: misspelling sweep, stale MD removal, CRM scope review.

notes: Three mechanical FUs bundled into one branch to minimize ceremony while remaining scope-locked. Misspelling sweep dominates the line count but is purely string-substitution within authority blocks. Stale MD removal is one git rm. CRM scope review is a verdict, not a code change. All three close in one PR. Substrate read confirmed 28 occurrences in 14 files at 14:47 PDT 2026-06-01; re-verified at Step 2 against current HEAD. Python str.replace used (macOS sed -i requires empty-string extension arg; platform-agnostic Python used instead per Step 3 deviation).
